raw_consumer_statement: I think it was around XX/XX/year> I booked a hotel room at the XXXX XXXX online I had one price. But after I booked the room it stated XXXX for XXXX nights for a XXXX XXXX so when I saw that I cancel because that was the wrong price. I then stay at other hotel. Then I started getting information from the XXXX XXXX and I was telling them that it was canceled but they won't give me my credit back. I filed a deput but they say the room was booked by a third party and they can't do nothing about it. So I closed the card and they continued adding late fees on the card.
